implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py exposes dispatch_by_capability(tool_name: str, payload_json: str, intent_pattern: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 60) -> str decorated with @tool(parse_docstring=True).
completion_promises.evidence: Module-level @tool(parse_docstring=True) function with the documented signature is present in src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py. TestAC001ToolExposure verifies the BaseTool wrapper exposes the four documented args via args_schema. Unchanged this turn.

Docstring transcribed from API-tools.md §3.1; two en-dashes in the cost/latency line were replaced with hyphens to satisfy ruff RUF002. All Resolution-order, Args, and Returns sections match. Verified by TestAC002Docstring substring assertions. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Resolution: exact CapabilityToolSummary.tool_name match wins; else intent_pattern substring match on descriptor role/description with highest-confidence (first match on lexicographic agent_id order for stability); else ERROR: unresolved.
completion_promises.evidence: _resolve_agent_id helper sorts descriptors by agent_id, runs exact tool_name match first, then intent_pattern substring fallback against descriptor.role/description, returns None → ERROR: unresolved string. Verified by TestAC003Resolution. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates payload_json is a JSON object literal (starts with `{`, parses to dict). Non-object / non-JSON → ERROR: invalid_payload — payload_json is not a JSON object literal.
completion_promises.evidence: lstrip-startswith-{ guard + json.loads + isinstance(dict) check returns the documented error string verbatim. TestAC004PayloadValidation parametrises 7 invalid payload shapes plus a round-trip object test. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates timeout_seconds in [5, 600]. Out of range → ERROR: invalid_timeout — timeout_seconds must be 5..600, got <n>.
completion_promises.evidence: Range guard returns the documented error string with the offending value interpolated. TestAC005TimeoutValidation parametrises out-of-range and in-range values. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Constructs a real nats_core.events.CommandPayload with command=tool_name, args=json.loads(payload_json), correlation_id=new_correlation_id() (uses TASK-J002-005 helper).
completion_promises.evidence: CommandPayload built from tool_name + parsed args + new_correlation_id(). TestAC006CommandPayloadConstruction captures the CommandPayload via the stub hook and asserts UUID4 shape + arg round-trip. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Constructs a real MessageEnvelope(source_id='jarvis', event_type=EventType.COMMAND, correlation_id=..., payload=command.model_dump(mode='json')).
completion_promises.evidence: MessageEnvelope built with the exact kwargs; payload_bytes derived from envelope.model_dump_json(). TestAC007LogLineShape exercises the path and asserts the rendered log line includes envelope-derived fields. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Emits exactly one logger.info call per invocation with message starting with LOG_PREFIX_DISPATCH and containing tool_name=<x> agent_id=<y> correlation_id=<z> topic=agents.command.<y> payload_bytes=<n>.
completion_promises.evidence: Single logger.info call uses LOG_PREFIX_DISPATCH constant as the leading %s with all five required fields as positional args. TestAC007LogLineShape asserts exactly-one anchored log line per invocation and verifies all required fields. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Honours _stub_response_hook: unset → canned ResultPayload JSON with success=True, result={'stub':True,'tool_name':<x>}, correlation_id=<same>; timeout → TIMEOUT: agent_id=<y> tool_name=<x> timeout_seconds=<n>; specialist_error → ERROR: specialist_error — agent_id=<y> detail=<reason>.
completion_promises.evidence: Match statement handles all three StubResponse variants plus the unset-hook canned-success path. TestAC008StubResponseHook covers every variant. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No retry inside the tool (DDR-009 §6); error string returned verbatim.
completion_promises.evidence: No retry/loop logic — every error path returns directly. The function emits a single log line per call (verified by TestAC007). Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Concurrent dispatches produce distinct correlation IDs; two parallel invocations yield two distinct JARVIS_DISPATCH_STUB log lines, each carrying its own correlation_id.
completion_promises.evidence: Each call generates its own correlation_id via new_correlation_id() (CSPRNG, no shared state). TestAC009Concurrency spawns 5 threads, asserts 5 distinct correlation_ids in both log lines and ResultPayload returns. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Seam test: dispatches succeed end-to-end through assemble_tool_list-wired supervisor fixture; log capture verifies exactly-one log line per call.
completion_promises.evidence: End-to-end test via dispatch.dispatch_by_capability.invoke({...}) goes through the @tool BaseTool wrapper and asserts exactly-one anchored log line. The bound_registry fixture mirrors the assemble_tool_list snapshot contract. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Never raises; Pydantic ValidationError on MessageEnvelope construction is caught and returned as ERROR: validation — <detail>.
completion_promises.evidence: try/except around CommandPayload+MessageEnvelope catches ValidationError → 'ERROR: validation — <msg>'. Hook invocation wrapped in try/except → 'ERROR: specialist_error — agent_id=<y> detail=<exc>'. TestAC010NeverRaises verifies. Unchanged this turn.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Turn 2 fixes: (a) Replaced `from datetime import datetime, timezone` with `from datetime import UTC, datetime` and switched `_now_utc()` to `datetime.now(UTC)` to clear UP017. (b) Added a `# noqa: UP040` to the `StubResponse: TypeAlias` declaration with an inline comment explaining that switching to PEP-695 `type` keyword would silently break the TASK-J002-007 swap-point contract tests (`get_args(dispatch.StubResponse)` requires the variants to be reachable directly, not via `__value__`). (c) Applied `ruff format` to dispatch.py and tests/test_dispatch_by_capability.py. Verified: `ruff check src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py tests/test_dispatch_by_capability.py` reports `All checks passed!` and `ruff format --check ...` reports `2 files already formatted`. All 108 dispatch-related tests still pass (38 dispatch_by_capability + 17 swap-point contract + 53 queue_build).
